title: OperationProgressNotification
description: Server-push notification emitted during long-running operations (host.scan, etc.). UI re-fetches the view model when status reaches success/failed/cancelled.

operationId.description: ID of the operation this progress update belongs to

processed.description: Number of items processed so far, or null if count is unknown

total.description: Total items to process, or null if count is unknown

message.description: Optional human-readable status message for display in UI

metadata.description: Optional result summary present only on terminal status events (success/failed/cancelled)
